title: System Reference Document

artifact.source_form: zip archive containing Rich Text Format SRD sections

upstream.creator: Wizards of the Coast
upstream.archive_note: Archived copy of the original Wizards of the Coast D&D 3.5e SRD distribution.

locator.bootstrap_rule: Use source-native file names plus section or entry paths. Do not invent page references for this source.

provenance_notes: The committed repo tracks the manifest and fetch workflow only. Raw SRD files remain local and untracked under data/raw/srd_35/.
This bootstrap slice uses an archived distribution source rather than a live Wizards-hosted endpoint.
Later ingestion should preserve file-level provenance so section and entry locators can be traced back to the original RTF files.
known_caveats: RTF file names are source-native and not always normalized for downstream identifiers.
The SRD archive is not paginated, so citation locators should use file and section paths rather than page ranges.
Some later Phase 1 questions will still require non-SRD sources and should remain outside this bootstrap slice.

handoff.extracted_expectation: Write extracted text or intermediate structured dumps under data/extracted/srd_35/ while preserving source file names.
handoff.canonical_expectation: Write canonical document JSON under data/canonical/srd_35/ using stable source_id and locator metadata.
